one_line_ask: License a large widescreen coastal stock photo, crop it into desktop and mobile homepage hero frames, grade both to a warm coastal look, place the client's vectorized Marisol Cove logo, and export web-ready JPEG/PNG banners plus a print-ready PDF proof from the client's authored InDesign banner template.
brief: Marisol Cove is a fictional boutique clifftop hotel on the Amalfi-style coast, refreshing its homepage. We need a premium, luxury-style homepage hero banner in two sizes — a Desktop hero (1920x720 px, wide cinematic band) and a Mobile hero (1080x1350 px, tall portrait) — that share one consistent image and brand identity. We do NOT have our own hero photography yet, so please license a suitable high-resolution widescreen coastal shot from Adobe Stock (think: turquoise sea, terraced clifftop villas, warm late-afternoon light, generous empty sky on one side so our headline and logo have room to breathe) — it must be large enough to crop both the wide desktop band and the tall mobile frame without any upscaling. Grade the licensed image to our warm "golden-hour coastal" look: lift the exposure a touch, warm the white balance, push vibrance so the sea and terracotta pop, and keep it clean and premium (no heavy filters). For both crops leave clear open space on the left third for our headline "Escape to the Cove" and our logo lockup — do not let the buildings or horizon crowd that zone. We are handing you our exact wordmark as a flat PNG (cream "Marisol Cove" with a small wave mark) — p
